name: prompt-architect
description: Turn rough ideas into complete prompts through a structured clarification workflow.

interface.shortDescription: Turn rough ideas into production-ready prompts
interface.longDescription: Clarifies material decisions with a stable numbered ledger, applies overrides precisely, and renders a complete prompt for ChatGPT, Codex, persistent instructions, Custom GPTs, or reusable skills.
defaultPrompt: Turn my rough idea into a production-ready prompt.
Improve this Codex prompt and resolve missing decisions.
Design durable instructions for my ChatGPT project.
